title: HuggingChat Cheat Sheet
description: Essential commands and tips for using HuggingChat effectively.

commands.command: Summarise this text
commands.description: Produces a concise summary of the provided text.
commands.scenario: When you need to quickly understand a long article.

commands.command: Rewrite this in simpler language
commands.description: Simplifies complex text for easier understanding.
commands.scenario: When an email or document is too complex.

commands.command: Generate ideas for a blog post about AI
commands.description: Provides creative ideas for blog posts.
commands.scenario: When you're stuck on what to write about next.

commands.command: Translate this text to Spanish
commands.description: Translates text into Spanish.

commands.command: Summarise this in 3 bullet points
commands.description: Creates a brief summary in bullet points.
commands.scenario: When you need a quick overview for a meeting.

commands.command: Explain this concept like I'm five
commands.description: Breaks down complex concepts into simple terms.
commands.scenario: When learning a new topic or explaining to a child.

commands.command: Create a to-do list for my project
commands.description: Generates a structured to-do list.
commands.scenario: When organizing tasks for a new project.

commands.command: Provide a detailed analysis of this topic
commands.description: Gives an in-depth analysis of a specified topic.
commands.scenario: When conducting research or preparing a report.

commands.command: Make this text more formal
commands.description: Reformats text to sound more professional.
commands.scenario: When preparing a formal letter or report.

commands.command: List pros and cons of this decision
commands.description: Outlines advantages and disadvantages.
commands.scenario: When weighing options for a decision.

commands.command: Draft a thank you email
commands.description: Creates a polite thank you email template.
commands.scenario: When you need to thank someone professionally.

commands.command: Generate a creative story about a dragon
commands.description: Produces a short creative story.
commands.scenario: When entertaining children or practicing creative writing.

commands.command: Convert this list into a paragraph
commands.description: Reformats a list into a cohesive paragraph.
commands.scenario: When turning bullet points into narrative text.

commands.command: Identify key themes in this text
commands.description: Highlights main themes and ideas.
commands.scenario: When analyzing literature or preparing for discussion.

commands.command: Correct grammar and spelling in this text
commands.description: Edits text for grammar and spelling errors.

commands.command: Act as a [Role] and critique my work
commands.description: Assign a specific persona (e.g., 'an expert editor' or 'a skeptical customer') to get constructive feedback on your writing or ideas.

commands.command: Create a table comparing [X] and [Y]
commands.description: Request information in a structured grid format to make comparisons between products, concepts, or options much easier to read.

commands.command: Extract all dates and names from this text
commands.description: Use this to quickly pull specific data points out of a long article or messy document without reading the whole thing.

commands.command: Give me 5 different versions of this [text/idea]
commands.description: Ask for multiple variations (e.g., '5 different subject lines') to avoid getting stuck with just one option.

commands.command: Write this in the style of [Famous Person/Author]
commands.description: Change the tone and personality of the text by mimicking a specific famous writer or public figure.
